name: Qingdao Victall Railway Co., Ltd.
summary: Qingdao Victall Railway Co., Ltd. provides modular products and components for high-speed trains, and urban rail and metro vehicles in China and internationally. Its principal products include rail vehicle passenger and driver interior, subway interior, sanitary water supply, door, air duct, kitchen, front end opening and closing mechanism, through-channel, and lighting systems; and rail vehicle exterior parts, fronts, luggage racks, subway folding seats, cab curtains, driver's cab back walls and doors, VIP side cabinets, 3D molded structural parts, BC parts, etc. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Qingdao, China.
